notes.n1: This run replaced inherited F25 family-default tire options with BMW EU wheel/tire approval-sheet packages, including corrected staggered 19- and 20-inch rear tire dimensions.
notes.n2: Official BMW PressClub technical-data PDF lists this as the baseline tire for the F25 X3 xDrive20d.
notes.n3: Official BMW PressClub technical-data PDF lists this as the baseline tire for the F25 X3 xDrive20i.

notes.n6: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF publishes a single 3.727 final-drive ratio for the exact X3 xDrive20d 6-speed manual configuration represented by this narrowed row. The repo duplicates that exact published ratio across the front and rear final-drive fields for the canonical AWD representation.

drivetrain.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF confirms xDrive all-wheel drive for the exact X3 xDrive20d 6-speed manual launch state represented by this narrowed 2011 row.

transmission.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF confirms a 6-speed manual transmission for the exact X3 xDrive20d launch state represented by this narrowed 2011 row. The repo keeps MT6 as the canonical gearbox-family mapping for that official manual transmission.
transmission.name: 6-speed manual

top_gear_ratio.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF lists 0.659 as the top-gear ratio for the exact X3 xDrive20d 6-speed manual configuration represented by this narrowed row.

gear_ratios.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF lists the full forward gear-ratio set for the exact X3 xDrive20d 6-speed manual configuration represented by this narrowed row.

verification_notes.note: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF establishes the exact launch-state X3 xDrive20d manual row: AWD, 6-speed manual, forward ratios 4.110 / 2.248 / 1.403 / 1.000 / 0.802 / 0.659, a single published 3.727 final-drive ratio, and 225/60 R17 baseline tires.

drivetrain.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF confirms xDrive all-wheel drive for the exact X3 xDrive20d 8-speed automatic launch state represented by this narrowed 2011 row.

transmission.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF confirms 8-speed automatic with Steptronic wording for the exact X3 xDrive20d launch state represented by this narrowed 2011 row. The repo keeps ZF8HP as the canonical gearbox-family mapping for that official automatic transmission.
transmission.name: 8-speed automatic (ZF 8HP)

top_gear_ratio.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF lists 0.667 as the top-gear ratio for the exact X3 xDrive20d 8-speed automatic configuration represented by this narrowed row.

gear_ratios.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF lists the full forward gear-ratio set for the exact X3 xDrive20d 8-speed automatic configuration represented by this narrowed row.

verification_notes.note: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF establishes the exact launch-state X3 xDrive20d automatic row: AWD, 8-speed automatic with Steptronic, forward ratios 4.714 / 3.143 / 2.106 / 1.667 / 1.285 / 1.000 / 0.839 / 0.667, a single published 3.077 final-drive ratio, and 225/60 R17 baseline tires.

drivetrain.notes: The official BMW 09/2011 technical-data PDF confirms xDrive all-wheel drive for the exact X3 xDrive20i 6-speed manual configuration.

transmission.notes: The official BMW 09/2011 technical-data PDF confirms a 6-speed manual transmission for the exact X3 xDrive20i manual configuration. The repo keeps MT6 as the canonical gearbox-family mapping for that official manual transmission.
transmission.name: 6-speed manual

top_gear_ratio.notes: The official BMW 09/2011 technical-data PDF lists 0.846 as the top-gear ratio for the exact X3 xDrive20i 6-speed manual configuration.

gear_ratios.notes: The official BMW 09/2011 technical-data PDF lists the full forward gear-ratio set for the exact X3 xDrive20i 6-speed manual configuration.

verification_notes.note: The official BMW 09/2011 technical-data PDF now confirms the exact X3 xDrive20i 6-speed manual configuration: xDrive AWD, 6-speed manual transmission, forward ratios 4.110 / 2.315 / 1.542 / 1.179 / 1.000 / 0.846, a single published final-drive ratio of 3.636, and 225/60 R17 baseline tires.

unresolved.reason: Official 2011 and 2014 BMW technical-data and EU wheel/tire approval sheets agree for launch and facelift-era values, but this broad row still does not independently prove exact public continuity through the final 2017 model year.

drivetrain.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF confirms xDrive all-wheel drive for the exact X3 xDrive28i automatic configuration.

transmission.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF confirms 8-speed automatic with Steptronic wording for the exact X3 xDrive28i automatic configuration. The repo keeps ZF8HP as the canonical gearbox-family mapping for that official 8-speed automatic.
transmission.name: 8-speed automatic (ZF 8HP)

top_gear_ratio.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF lists 0.667 as the top-gear ratio for the exact X3 xDrive28i 8-speed automatic configuration.

gear_ratios.notes: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF lists the full forward gear-ratio set for the exact X3 xDrive28i 8-speed automatic configuration.

verification_notes.note: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF shows that the exact early X3 xDrive28i row is a 2996 cc inline-6 AWD automatic configuration with the 4.714 / 3.143 / 2.106 / 1.667 / 1.285 / 1.000 / 0.839 / 0.667 ratio set, a single published 3.727 final-drive ratio, and 225/60 R17 baseline tires. The official 03/2012 refresh sheet then changes xDrive28i to a 1997 cc four-cylinder state with a 3.385 final drive, so the old 2011-2017 broad row was split instead of preserving one mixed-era mapping.

drivetrain.notes: The official BMW 03/2012 technical-data PDF confirms xDrive all-wheel drive for the refreshed X3 xDrive28i automatic state represented by this narrowed 2012 row.

transmission.notes: The official BMW 03/2012 technical-data PDF confirms 8-speed automatic with Steptronic wording for the refreshed X3 xDrive28i state represented by this narrowed 2012 row. The repo keeps ZF8HP as the canonical gearbox-family mapping for that official automatic transmission.
transmission.name: 8-speed automatic (ZF 8HP)

top_gear_ratio.notes: The official BMW 03/2012 technical-data PDF lists 0.667 as the top-gear ratio for the exact X3 xDrive28i 8-speed automatic configuration represented by this narrowed row.

gear_ratios.notes: The official BMW 03/2012 technical-data PDF lists the full forward gear-ratio set for the exact X3 xDrive28i 8-speed automatic configuration represented by this narrowed row.

verification_notes.note: The official BMW 03/2012 technical-data PDF establishes the corrected X3 xDrive28i automatic row for the four-cylinder era: AWD, 8-speed automatic with Steptronic, 1997 cc inline-4 turbo engine identity, the same forward ratio set, a lower 3.385 final-drive ratio, and 225/60 R17 baseline tires.
